name: e5-enclave-website
description: E5 Enclave Incorporated — Sovereign Institutional Website

scripts.render:cinematic: docker build -f tools/hyperframes/Dockerfile -t e5-hyperframes . && docker run --rm -v $PWD/artifacts:/work/artifacts e5-hyperframes
scripts.preview:cinematic: cd tools/hyperframes && npm install && npm run preview
scripts.dev: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 3000 --directory dist
